---
title: "Poisson rate uncertainty posterior"
format: html
---

Basic parameters

```{r}
true_rate <- 2
n_events <- 1000
waiting_times <- round(rexp(n_events, rate = true_rate),3)
event_times <- cumsum(waiting_times)
total_time <- sum(waiting_times)
time_vec <- seq(0, total_time, 0.001)
```

Define and plot prior belief about possible rates

```{r}
prior_alpha <- 1
prior_beta <- 1
plot(\(x) dgamma(x, shape = prior_alpha, rate = prior_beta), to = 10)
```

Calculate how mean and variance changes over time and with events


```{r}
count_events_before <- function(t, event_times) {
  colSums(outer(event_times, t, `<`))
}

mean_posterior <- function(t, counts, alpha, beta) {
  (alpha + counts) / (beta + t)
}

var_posterior <- function(t, counts, alpha, beta) {
  (alpha + counts) / (beta + t)^2
}

posterior_smry <- function(t, event_times, alpha, beta) {
  counts <- count_events_before(t, event_times)
  data.frame(
    times = t,
    mean = mean_posterior(t, counts, alpha, beta), 
    var = var_posterior(t, counts, alpha, beta)
  )
}

posterior <- posterior_smry(
  time_vec, event_times, alpha = prior_alpha, beta = prior_beta
)

par(mfrow = c(1, 2))
plot(posterior$times, posterior$mean, pch = ".")
plot(posterior$times, posterior$var, pch = ".")

```

Plot posterior distributions right before and right after each event

```{r}
#| label: fig-event-posterior-jumps
library(ggplot2)
library(ggdist)
library(distributional)

build_event_posteriors <- function(event_times, event_indices, alpha, beta) {
  data.frame(
    event = rep(seq_along(event_indices), each = 2),
    timing = rep(c("Before", "After"), times = length(event_indices)),
    shape = alpha + c(rbind(event_indices - 1, event_indices)),
    rate = beta + rep(event_times, each = 2)
  )
}

plot_indices <- round(seq(1, n_events, length.out = 10))
plot_event_times <- event_times[plot_indices]
posterior_events <- build_event_posteriors(plot_event_times, plot_indices, prior_alpha, prior_beta)
posterior_events$rate_dist <- dist_gamma(
  shape = posterior_events$shape,
  rate = posterior_events$rate
)

ggplot(posterior_events, aes(y = event, xdist = rate_dist, fill = timing, color = timing)) +
  stat_slab(
    alpha = 0.5,
    scale = 1.5,
    normalize = "panels"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq_along(plot_indices),
    labels = paste("Event", plot_indices)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Rate",
    title = "Posterior belief about rate around each event"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
